title: Teacher Prompt Sheet
description: Teacher-only prompts and facilitation notes for the What Is AI picture sort.
content: Definition to repeat: AI is a computer helper made by people. Use prompts: Who or what is helping? Is it a person; an ordinary tool; or a computer helper? What job does it help with?

title: Picture Sort Cards and Mat
description: Printable classroom material with three labels and simple picture-card prompts.
content: Three labels: People helpers; Ordinary tools; AI helpers. Picture cards: teacher; librarian; pencil; calculator; translation app; voice helper.
